UsageCost: Extra fees for exceeding time limits(3hrs.for AC,even shorter for DC)!To avoid extra costs restart charging according to time limits.

AddressInfo.Title: PRE Public Charging Station(AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AddressLine2: On the roof-parking lot of the shopping mall.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Public access with time limit.On the roof of the shopping center.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for PRE registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;13.5CZK for E.On users. Max.3hrs.of continuous charging.To avoid extra fees restart charging every 3hrs..

GeneralComments: Restaurants & restrooms available just 1 floor below(accessible by elevator/escalator).
